name: ProMax Smartphone X1
description: A high-performance smartphone with a 6.7-inch OLED display, triple-lens camera system, and ultra-fast processing speed.

description: Experience pure sound with noise-canceling technology and 40-hour battery life. Perfect for long travel and work sessions.

name: Classic Cotton Kurta - Indigo
description: A comfortable and breathable traditional cotton kurta, perfect for daily wear or festive occasions. Ethically sourced cotton.

name: Chronicles of Ancient India
description: A deep dive into the rich cultural and political history of the Indian subcontinent, from the Indus Valley to the modern era.

description: Sleek, matte-finish ceramic vase. Its neutral tone complements any modern interior design.
